ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Primary goal of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region receiving the grant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program under which the grant is allocated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the grant is allocated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the region */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of projects funded by the grant */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the grant */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the grant was approved */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., allocation, expenditure, adjustment) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was approved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region making the request */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program under which the request is made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the request is made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount requested by the region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the funding request */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rejection of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, regional officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view grants, manage transactions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
